title: Cuneiform Tablet #0233: Ur III Marriage Contract
description: A cuneiform tablet from the Ur III period — a marriage contract document preserved on clay.
introduction: A cuneiform tablet from the Ur III period — a marriage contract document preserved on clay.

translation.text: Cuneiform tablet of the Ur III period. Marriage Contract document. Inscribed on clay in cuneiform script. The tablet records marriage contract matters typical of Ur III period administrative or literary practice.
